subject: [PATCH 11/14] nfsd: add netlink upcall for the svc_export cache

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the implementation of nfsd_cache_notify() and suggested alternative approaches to handle cache notifications.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the svc_export (nfsd.export) cache, enabling userspace to receive notifications about pending requests and updates.
